chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, BENCH AT SUKKUR Const. Petition No.D-1572 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge. Hearing of Case 1.For orders on office objections. 2.For hearing of main case. 20-03-2025 None present for the petitioner. Mr. Karim Bux Janwari, Assistant Attorney General. ***** None present for the petitioner; no intimation is received; same was the position on the last date of hearing, which reflects that petitioner and his counsel have lost interest in proceeding of this matter. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE JUDGE Ahmad
